texto: Vanessa insisted that film was exactly like poetry. Nothing necessarily had to happen
autor: you just had to feel something.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a you just had to feel something.: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “Vanessa insisted that film was exactly like poetry. Nothing necessarily had to happen” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, cecily-von-ziegesar, vanessa pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.
